name: "Bug report"

## What you expected / 기대한 것

## What happened / 실제 일어난 것

     print plain-language reasons:
     .\scripts\Test-Containment.ps1 -Path . -AllFiles

## Environment / 환경

- OS: <!-- Windows / macOS / Linux -->
- Tool: <!-- Claude Code / OpenAI Codex / both -->
